# 📈 AI模拟盘 自动交易报告

本项目利用 Github Action 定时运行 Claude Code，并结合MCP工具，实现在欧易模拟盘环境下自动交易。

xychart
    title "模拟盘余额"
    line ## 资产明细
- **BTC**: $42543.1
- **ETH**: $3412.4
- **SOL**: $4819.9
- **USDT**: $49337.8

## 交易记录
- 2026-01-30T10:50:56.853373 - AI分析: SOL-买入信号(70分) MACD底背离，企稳迹象
- 2026-01-30T10:50:56.853371 - AI分析: ETH-买入信号(75分) RSI超卖，短期回调到位
- 2026-01-30T10:50:56.853367 - AI分析: BTC-买入信号(85分) RSI超卖，KDJ低位，MACD即将金叉
- 2026-01-30T07:02:49.484333 - No new trades executed due to strong bearish market signals across all trading pairs
- 2026-01-30T03:12:54.074289 - Sell 0.41878 BTC @ 82144.64 USDT for 34414.81 USDT
- 2026-01-29T07:01:14.786501 - Sold 0.2 ETH at $2,957 for $591.40
- 2026-01-29T07:01:14.786497 - Sold 0.3 BTC at $88,314.55 for $26,494.37

## MCP工具
- [mcp-aktools](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-aktools): 用于查询价格走势及行情
- [mcp-okx](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-okx): 用于获取欧易账户信息和下单
- [mcp-notify](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-notify): 用于推送分析结果到指定渠道(可选)
- [mcp-hooks](https://github.com/aahl/ai-trading/tree/main/mcp-hooks.py): 用于保存交易结果和更新Readme
